introSection: Munich Autobahn (Japanese:ミュンヘンアウトバーン) was a bobsled roller coaster previously located at Kobe Portopialand in Chuo, Kobe, Hyōgo, Japan.

fullText:
Munich Autobahn (Japanese:ミュンヘンアウトバーン) was a bobsled roller coaster previously located at Kobe Portopialand in Chuo, Kobe, Hyōgo, Japan.



White track and green supports




 * Munich Autobahn on the parks website (Japanese)
